title: Bitcoin Blockchain Definition: Core Components & Relationships
description: A flowchart illustrating the fundamental components that define Bitcoin as a blockchain-based cryptocurrency and their hierarchical relationships.
relationships: The Peer-to-Peer Network secures the Distributed Ledger
Cryptography secures transactions and enables Proof-of-Work
Proof-of-Work Consensus secures the network and validates transaction blocks
The Native Cryptocurrency (BTC) is the incentive for miners and the medium of exchange
